note: Updated for SSOT Phase 5: focus on beat structure over specific phrases

cases.title: Philidor / Legal's-mate motif: 4...h6?
cases.referenceExcerpt:
4 ... h6?
Definitely an unnecessary pawn move! ...
5 Nxe5!!
Now if Black captures the knight with 5 ... dxe5 White replies with 6 Qxg4 ...

cases.title: Queen's Indian: early tension release (9.cxd5)
cases.referenceExcerpt: Best practice is often to maintain the uncertainty (tension) in the centre as long as possible, developing for both scenarios. After an early release of tension, the cramped side can often place pieces on their most natural squares.
